config.comments.module_ai.llm_frequency_: The frequency penalty of the LLM, ranging from -2 to 2.
config.comments.module_ai.llm_max_tokens: Limit the maximum number of tokens for LLMs.
config.comments.module_ai.llm_presence_p: The presence penalty of the LLM, ranging from -2 to 2.
config.comments.module_ai.llm_temperatur: The temperature sampling of the LLMs, ranging from 0 to 2. It is not recommended to modify it at the same time as top_p.
config.comments.module_ai.llm_top_p: The nucleus sampling of the LLM, ranging from 0 to 1. It is not recommended to modify it at the same time as temperature.
